messages.content: 我在申请国外的MBA项目，专业是零售管理，需要提交一篇英文的说明稿，问题描述是“What are the multiculturalism aspects of your profile ? Give examples”，请帮我写一篇在150字以内的说明稿。

As an international student who has lived and studied in multiple countries, I have been exposed to diverse cultures and perspectives. Growing up in a multicultural family, I have learned to embrace different values and beliefs, and adapt to various social norms. For instance, my experience studying in Japan taught me the value of precision and attention to detail in business, while my time in the U.S. showed me the importance of innovation and entrepreneurship. Moreover, my work experience in customer service has allowed me to interact with people from different backgrounds and develop my cross-cultural communication skills. Through these experiences, I have developed a global mindset and the ability to navigate cultural differences.

我在申请国外的MBA项目，需要提交一篇英文的说明稿，说明下自己有哪些多元化方面，并举例说明，字数需精简在150字以内，我的中文内容是：中学时期我爱好踢足球，并且差一点就进入职业球队成为一名足球运动员，现在依然每周会进行高水平的足球运动。高中时期，我非常喜欢计算机编程，建立过技术知识的分享站点，大学时是Adobe公司Flex技术在国内最早的传道士，分享了大量的技术知识。我在阿里巴巴工作的经历，让我明白了用户体验和深入到用户生活中进行调研的重要性，我也去过国内的很多城市，每到一个城市我都会尽可能的体验当地的饮食和生活习惯，这让我有了丰富的跨地域生活经历和文化沟通的经历。

I have a diverse background, both professionally and personally. During high school, I excelled at football, nearly becoming a professional player. I still play at a high level on a weekly basis. I also developed a passion for computer programming and built a technology sharing website in high school. In college, I became one of the earliest adopters of Adobe's Flex technology in China and shared my knowledge with a large audience. My work at Alibaba taught me the importance of user experience and conducting research on user lifestyles. I have also traveled extensively throughout China, exploring local cuisine and customs. This has given me a wealth of cross-regional and cultural experiences, which have helped me develop strong communication and adaptability skills.

我在申请国外的MBA项目，专业是零售管理，需要提交一篇英文的说明稿，问题描述是“Do you adapt well to new and challenging situations? Develop your answer”，请帮我写一篇在150字以内的说明稿，我自己的一部分中文内容是：过往的学习和工作经历证明了，我有很强的自学能力，对于陌生的新问题，我会非常感兴趣并主动投入足够的精力，去彻底的弄明白它产生的原因，它的前因后果，而对于有挑战的事情，我会更感兴趣，因为它可以让我有很大的学习和成长空间，同时也可能隐藏着创新机会。

My past experience in both education and work has proved that I am capable of adapting well to new and challenging situations. I have a strong ability to self-learn and when faced with unfamiliar situations, I tend to be curious and put in the effort to fully understand the problem. I dig into the root causes and explore the potential outcomes. In fact, I am more interested in challenging situations because I see them as opportunities to learn and grow. I believe they often present innovative solutions, which can be rewarding both personally and professionally. Therefore, I have developed a growth mindset that helps me approach new situations with a positive attitude and a willingness to take risks. I am confident that my adaptability, resilience and determination will bring value to any situation I face.

我在申请国外的MBA项目，专业是零售管理，需要提交一篇英文的说明稿，问题描述是“Describe your major strengths and weaknesses. ”，请帮我写一篇在150字以内的说明稿，我自己的一部分中文内容是：优势方面，第一点是我有很强的创新能力，这源自于最近我喜欢深入到用户的工作生活当中，去了解他们的现状。第二点是我有很强的认知能力，我喜欢看一些“人类社群发展、人类关系、认知与脑科学”等方面的书籍和文献。第三点是我在工作时会投入热情和激情，在京东期间我成功晋升到总监职级时，这是好几位副总裁给我的评语。我的劣势方面，是本科学历是自考的，没有系统化的学习大学课程，可能存在部分知识的不足。所以，我需要更多的理论知识学习来充实自己。

My major strengths include strong innovation capability, which stems from my passion for delving into the work and life of users, allowing me to gain an in-depth understanding of their current situation. I also possess excellent cognitive ability, as I enjoy reading books and literature related to the development of human society, human relations, cognition, and neuroscience. Additionally, my enthusiasm and passion are evident in my work, as highlighted by the several vice-presidents who praised me when I was promoted to director during my tenure at Jingdong.

Currently, my major weakness is that my undergraduate education was self-taught, and I did not receive a formal education in college, missing out on some of the systematic learning associated with traditional university education. Therefore, I need to expose myself to more theoretical knowledge and education to enhance my overall knowledge base.

我在申请国外的MBA项目，专业是零售管理，需要提交一篇英文的说明稿，问题描述是“Describe your major strengths and weaknesses. ”，请帮我写一篇在150字以内的说明稿，我自己的一部分中文内容是：优势方面，第一点是我有很强的创新能力，这源自于最近我喜欢深入到用户的工作生活当中，去了解他们的现状。第二点是我有很强的认知能力，我喜欢看一些“人类社群发展、人类关系、认知与脑科学”等方面的书籍和文献。第三点是我在工作时会投入热情和激情，在京东集团工作期间我成功晋升到总监职级时，好几位副总裁都称赞了我具备激情。我的劣势方面，是本科学历是自考的，没有系统化的学习大学课程，可能存在部分知识的不足。所以，我需要更多的理论知识学习来充实自己。

My major strengths include strong innovativeness, which is derived from my recent work on user research, enabling me to explore and understand their current state. Additionally, I possess excellent cognitive ability, as I enjoy reading books and literature related to human social development, relationships, cognition, and neuroscience. Plus, I feel passionately about my work, which is evident in my achievements at JD Group, where I successfully climbed the ranks to director level, receiving praise from several vice-presidents for my commitment.

As for my weaknesses, my undergraduate degree was self-taught, and I did not have a chance to undergo a systematic learning process, potentially leaving me with knowledge gaps. Therefore, I need to expose myself to more theoretical knowledge and education to enhance my overall knowledge base. However, I am committed to overcoming this weakness and further developing my skills in line with my future goals.

我在申请国外的MBA项目，专业是零售管理，需要提交一篇英文的说明稿，问题描述是“Describe your major strengths and weaknesses. ”，请帮我写一篇在150字以内的说明稿，我自己的一部分中文内容是：优势方面，第一点是我有很强的创新能力，这源自于最近我喜欢深入到用户的工作生活当中，去了解他们的现状。第二点是我有很强的认知能力，我喜欢看一些“人类社群发展、人类关系、认知与脑科学”等方面的书籍和文献。第三点是我在工作时会投入热情和激情，在京东集团工作期间我成功晋升到总监职级时，好几位副总裁都称赞了我身上具备激情的特质。我的劣势方面，是本科学历是自考的，没有系统化的学习大学课程，可能存在部分知识的不足。所以，我需要更多的理论知识学习来充实自己。

My major strengths include strong innovativeness, as I enjoy delving into the work and life of users to gain insight into their current situation. I also possess impressive cognitive ability, as I enjoy reading books and literature related to human social development, relationships, cognition, and neuroscience. Moreover, my enthusiasm and passion are evident in my work, as highlighted by my promotion to director level during my tenure at JD Group, with several vice-presidents praising my passion for the job.

As for my weaknesses, my undergraduate degree was self-taught, and I did not have the opportunity to undergo a more systematic learning process, potentially leaving me with gaps in knowledge. Therefore, I need to expose myself to more theoretical knowledge and education to enhance my overall knowledge base. However, I am committed to overcoming this weakness and further developing my skills in line with my future career aspirations.

我在申请国外的MBA项目，专业是零售管理，需要提交一篇英文的说明稿，问题描述是“How do you see your career progressing for the next 3 years ? ”，请帮我写一篇在100-150字左右的说明稿，我自己的一部分中文内容是：将精力和重点，更多的从技术管理岗转移到产品和业务管理上，更深入了解一线的零售企业，围绕重点客户，打造有竞争力的数字化产品和服务，希望带领公司经过2-3年的时间，成为国内领先的数字化零售服务商，帮助零售客户实现体验和效率的提升。

Over the next three years, I plan to shift my focus from technical management to product and business management by investing more time and energy in gaining an in-depth understanding of frontline retail businesses. I aim to create competitive digitized products and services centered on key customer segments. I seek to lead my company in becoming a leading domestic digital retail service provider, guiding retail clients in enhancing both their efficiency and experience. To achieve this vision, I will leverage not only my technical and operational knowledge but also my skills in project leadership and cross-functional collaboration. In short, my goal over the next three years is to steer my company to greater success in the increasingly digital marketplace.

我在申请国外的MBA项目，专业是零售管理，需要提交一篇英文的说明稿，问题描述是“How do you see your career progressing for the next 3 years ? ”，请帮我写一篇在100-150字左右的说明稿，我自己的一部分中文内容是：将自己IDE精力更多的从技术管理转到产品和业务管理上，更深入的了解一线的零售企业现状，围绕重点客户，打造有竞争力的数字化产品和服务，希望通过2-3年的时间，带领公司成为国内领先的数字化零售服务商，帮助零售企业实现体验和效率的升级。

In the next three years, I envision shifting my focus from technical management to product and business management. I plan on gaining deeper insights into the state of frontline retail operations, with the aim of creating competitively digitized services and products, targeted toward key clients. I hope to lead my company to become a domestic leader in digital retail services, with a vision to help retail enterprises enhance their overall efficiency and experience. Achieving this vision will require me to leverage my IDE background, work on building skills in project leadership, and invest time in collaborative partnerships across business functions. Ultimately, I am confident that my goal-oriented approach and strong commitment will put me in an excellent position to succeed in steering my company to even greater heights over the next three years.

我在申请国外的MBA项目，专业是零售管理，需要提交一篇英文的说明稿，问题描述是“How do you see your career progressing for the next 3 years ? ”，请帮我写一篇在100-150字左右的说明稿，我自己的一部分中文内容是：将自己的精力更多的从技术管理转到产品和业务管理上，更深入的了解一线的零售企业现状，围绕重点客户，打造有竞争力的数字化产品和服务，希望通过2-3年的时间，带领公司成为国内领先的数字化零售服务商，帮助零售企业实现体验和效率的升级。

Over the next three years, I plan to shift my career focus from technical management to product and business management. I plan to invest more time into gaining deeper insights into frontline retail operations, creating competitive digitized products and services focused on key clients. My goal is to lead my company to become a national leader in digital retail services in 2-3 years, in order to help retail businesses improve their overall efficiency and customer experience. Achieving this will require my deep understanding of technology management, coupled with my skills in project leadership and cross-functional collaboration. I look forward to the challenges and opportunities that come with leading my company's growth in the rapidly evolving retail space.

我在申请国外的MBA项目，专业是零售管理，需要提交一篇英文的说明稿，问题描述是“Describe the main reasons you want to join this program ”，请帮我写一篇在100-150字左右的说明稿，我自己的一部分中文内容是：近些年都在阿里巴巴集团和京东集团从事零售相关的创新管理工作，23年加入了现在的公司，作为CTO开始负责公司的零售战略转型，而中大型的零售企业是我们转型的重点客户，我非常需要以全球化的视野，去看待零售企业的发展，相信通过诺欧商学院的国际化课程，可以提升我的零售管理水平，使得我可以更专业的推进公司战略规划，帮助更多的企业实现零售数字化转型和服务升级。

The primary reason I want to join this program is to gain a global perspective on the development of retail enterprises, especially for large and medium-sized retail companies undergoing transformation. As a CTO with experience at both Alibaba Group and JD.com, I have been tasked with driving the retail strategy transformation of my company. The customers we target are primarily large retail enterprises, and I believe gaining a global perspective on the latest retail management techniques through the international program at your esteemed institution will enable me to enhance my professional skills and contribute to the strategic planning of my company. Ultimately, I aim to leverage the knowledge gained in this program to help to push more retail businesses towards digitized transformation and service upgrades, leading the way in innovative retail practices.
